---
name: Feature Request / Tool Suggestion
about: Suggest a new tool or improvement to an existing one
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
What research workflow pain point would this address? (You don't need to know how to code it — just describe the problem.)

**Describe your idea**
What would the tool do? What would you input, and what would you get back?

**Who would use this?**
What field / discipline / career stage is this most useful for?

**Have you seen this problem in a specific context?**
Any examples of when you or colleagues faced this challenge?

**Priority for you**
- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Would save me significant time
- [ ] Critical pain point — I face this constantly
